comment: Port matrix (human ruled). Claude Code is not listed: it always ships the full feature set and is the source of truth. Each platform below is a projection: which reference docs inject at session start, which skills ship, and whether the external-agent router ports. utils/generate-platform-assets.sh projects this into codex/, pi/, and the root hooks.json; extensions/attune.js and hooks/_lib.mjs read it at runtime.
